items.name: KB Initialization
items.summary: Install KB template, state, prompts, and hooks into target repository.

items.name: Maintenance Pipeline
items.summary: Run sync, tests, doctor checks in one command path with fast mode option.

items.name: Impact Analysis
items.summary: Resolve document/code impact relationships and output actionable impact state.

items.name: Release Pipeline DSL
items.summary: Initialize, plan, and run release pipeline steps with safety gates.

items.name: Intent Workspace
items.summary: Create staged intent workspaces and apply/cancel with governance metadata.

items.name: Chaos Coefficient
items.summary: Compute AI confidence index with deep scan, KB context signals, and risk estimate bands.

items.name: KB Index Summary
items.summary: Build placeholder/verification/source index summary for governance visibility.

items.name: Multi-Agent Scoped Orchestration
items.summary: Introduce per-repo scoped KB agents and coordinator workflow with strict folder boundaries.
